title: Hornet Removal in Midwood, Brooklyn | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Midwood, Brooklyn. Safe, fast elimination of hornets from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350 – $550 service!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Midwood residents, especially in the tree-lined streets and multi-family homes that define this classic Brooklyn neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Midwood, protecting families and properties from these aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Midwood homeowners and businesses for years with reliable, safe hornet removal solutions. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate hornets quickly while ensuring the safety of your family, pets, and neighbors in this densely populated Brooklyn community.
localContext: Midwood's tree-canopied streets, vintage Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to green spaces like Marine Park create ideal conditions for hornet nesting. From the stately homes near Brooklyn College to the bustling commercial areas along Avenue M and Coney Island Avenue, our team knows the unique challenges Midwood properties face with stinging insect infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Midwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service in Midwood. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment as quickly as possible, often within 24 hours, to safely eliminate the nest and protect your property from these aggressive insects.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. Our technicians use professional-grade products and proven techniques that effectively eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and neighbors. We follow strict safety protocols and can advise you on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection to locate all nests, safe removal and treatment of the hornet colony, nest elimination, and preventative recommendations. The final price depends on factors like nest location, size, accessibility, and the number of nests present on your Midwood property.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have hornets versus wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and bees, typically measuring 1-1.5 inches long with thick bodies. They build large, papery nests often in trees, attics, or under eaves. If you're unsure, don't approach the nest—our Midwood technicians can safely identify the species and recommend the appropriate treatment during inspection.
